title: Evidence
description: Store pieces of evidence that confirm your customer’s location. Evidence object can be attached to a supply object and it can only be attached to one supply object at a time.

country_code.description: 2-letter ISO country code of the bank or payment source.

name.description: Name of the bank or payment source.

city.description: City of the customer’s billing address.

country_code.description: 2-letter ISO country code of the customer’s billing address.

line_1.description: Line 1 of the customer’s billing address.

line_2.description: Line 2 of the customer’s billing address.

postal_code.description: Postal code of the customer’s billing address.

state.description: State of the customer’s billing address.

created.description: ISO date at which the object was created.

label.description: The same IP address coming from the `ip_address.label` body parameter which will be geolocated automatically.

provider.description: Provider used to geolocate `ip_address.label`. We use MaxMind® GeoIP2 geolocation technology by default but have a number of fallback providers.

city.description: City of the geolocated IP address.

country_code.description: 2-letter ISO country code of the geolocated IP address.

state.description: State of the geolocated IP address.

required_count.description: Required pieces of evidence according to your account’s regional settings.

updated.description: ISO date at which the object was updated.
